description: Milestone 1: bootstrap existing Xcode project into Clean Architecture + MVVM structure with docs, config, and placeholder UI shell.

userStories.title: Create required repo folders and relocate existing Xcode files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the repo to match the required folder structure so future features are modular and maintainable.
acceptanceCriteria: Folders exist: App/, Features/, Core/, Resources/, Config/, Tests/, Docs/ (per spec)
Project still builds and runs after moving files

userStories.title: Implement AppState auth state machine and fake login toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I see a login screen when logged out and a tab shell when logged in (stubbed for now).
acceptanceCriteria: Auth states exist: loggedOut, loggingIn, loggedIn, error
Toggling fake login switches to the tab UI

userStories.title: Create Tab Bar shell with 5 tabs and placeholder screens
userStories.description: As a logged-in user, I can navigate Forum/Messages/Knowledge/Todos/Profile via tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab bar has exactly 5 tabs (Forum, Messages, Knowledge, Todos, Profile)
Each tab shows a placeholder view with a title

userStories.title: Add xcconfig configuration system with sample secrets file
userStories.description: As a developer, I can configure URLs and keys without committing secrets.
acceptanceCriteria: No secrets are hardcoded in source files

userStories.title: Add KeychainService wrapper and minimal unit test
userStories.description: As a developer, I have a Keychain abstraction ready for tokens later.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one unit test validates set/get/delete behavior (using test key)
No tokens or PII are logged

userStories.title: Add required documentation files and initial content
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I can understand the architecture, status, and open questions.
acceptanceCriteria: Docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md exists and lists Milestone 1 as current

userStories.title: Add a smoke UI test: app launches and shows login screen
userStories.description: As a developer, I have a minimal UI test baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: Test verifies app launches and login screen element exists
